texto: Once the troops move into Cambodia, the colleges and universities of this country were on the verge of civil war. Many closed down. The students were up in arms. And it looked very much like there were going to be real problems in this country.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a William Kunstler: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Once the troops move into Cambodia, the colleges and universities of this country were on the ver…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, problems, down pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de down e country.
